channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 9, 2024
item.description: The guys pick 15 games across the Bay Area, including Valley Christian at St. Ignatius, Campolindo at Clayton Valley, Half Moon Bay at San Mateo, Miramonte at Las Lomas.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Ohtani's historic 50-50 ball sells at auction for nearly $4.4M amid ongoing dispute over ownership
item.description: Shohei Ohtani’s 50th home run ball has sold at auction for nearly $4.4 million, a record high price not just for a baseball, but for any ball in any sport, the auctioneer said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, Mexican-born pitcher whose feats for Dodgers fueled 'Fernandomania,' dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Los Angeles Dodgers pitching ace who inspired “Fernandomania” in the early 1980s, has died.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mets fans now have more reason to be optimistic about the future
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- As the World Series gets going Friday night in Los Angeles between the Yankees and Dodgers, let's give some credit to the New York Mets. Yes, they fell short and it stings and their magical run came to an end on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: 76ers rule Embiid and George out for opener with injuries. Bucks' Middleton also expected to be out
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Paul George's debut with the Philadelphia 76ers is on hold and Joel Embiid is again set to miss time with an injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: National League Champions: Dodgers advance to the World Series with 10-5 win over Mets
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SDSU'S Sack Master Trey White
item.description: Sacks are such an unpredictable stat in the game of Football. You can be absolutely unlockable as a defender, but if the quarterback gets the ball out of his hands before you arrive, it's all for not in the stat column.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC
